items.name: explain-code
items.title: Explain Code
items.description: Walk through a file, function, class, or module and explain what it does, how it works, and why it is structured the way it is. Suited for onboarding onto unfamiliar code, understanding a complex algorithm, or preparing to modify something you have not read before. Pass a file path or a symbol name as the argument.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
